title: Fix Next/Previous Navigation Getting Stuck on Grouped Rows
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the left/right navigation arrows to skip over group header rows when grouping is enabled, so that I can navigate between data rows without getting stuck.
description:
When grouping is enabled on a table and the user navigates using left/right arrow icons, the navigation cursor would land on a group header row and become stuck — unable to advance to the next data row.

The fix detects when the current selection is on a grouped row and automatically advances to the next valid data row in the navigation sequence.
acceptance_criteria: Left/right navigation arrows skip group header rows
Navigation advances to the next data row when landing on a group row
Navigation works correctly in both forward and backward directions when grouping is active
Behavior is unchanged when grouping is disabled
ux_changes: Left/right navigation arrows now skip group header rows and auto-advance to the next data row, preventing navigation from getting stuck.
middleware_changes: Added logic to detect group header rows during navigation and automatically skip to the next valid data row in sequence.
implementation_notes: The navigation handler checks if the current row is a group header and, if so, recursively advances to the next data row.
comment_summary: Developer fixed the issue and pushed to staging for review. No further discussion.
